series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to the random audit of continuing education, and may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, licensee's logs of continuing education, supporting documentation, etdc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy.If not scanned, retain for 2 years following the end of the year in which the licensee is in compliance with all audit requirements, then destroy.years after licensee is in compliance with all audit requirements; then destroy ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the year in which the licensee achieves compliance with all audit requirements., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
